tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "UbuntuComputer-Grp"
        set member "UbuntuComputer"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "Block-Ubuntu-FileUpload"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-Grp"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
show firewall policy"}
